title: Midnight Lo-Fi Wave
prompt: Instrumental only. Warm lo-fi wave for deep work and coding: mellow Rhodes electric piano, soft sub bass, dusty tape texture, restrained brushed kick and snare, a quiet analog pulse, and spacious chord changes. Calm, hypnotic, low-to-medium energy, no vocals, no bright lead, no abrupt drop, no harsh highs, no busy hi-hat pattern. Structure: a short arrival, a settled groove, one small harmonic opening, a restrained return, and a soft unresolved release.
